summary: P1.8-9 Today's Report: five domain cards with tab switcher on Home, aggregating unified operational fixtures; reduced-motion respected; embedded between Shop Status hero and decision preview.

interfaceChanges.description: Aggregates five domain summaries from UnifiedOperationalDataModel fixtures.
Tabbed domain switcher with animated card transitions on Home.
Inserts TodaysReportPanel between ShopHealthHero and RecommendedDecisionsPreview.

mappings.criterion: All 5 domains reachable via switcher on Home
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue194_todays_report.test.tsx::renders all five domain tabs on Home between hero and decision preview

mappings.criterion: Each domain card renders status + trend + at least one metric delta from fixtures
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_todays_report.test.ts::includes status, trend, and at least one metric for non-empty domains
web/src/__tests__/test_issue194_todays_report.test.tsx::disables card animation when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce

mappings.criterion: Component test: domain switch updates visible card content
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue194_todays_report.test.tsx::updates visible card content when switching domains

mappings.criterion: Mobile layout: switcher usable at 375px width
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue194_todays_report.test.tsx::keeps switcher usable at 375px width with horizontally scrollable tabs
